summary: A compact rectangular bunker-style structure with a dark wood plank roof, stone brick foundation and walls, wooden plank mid-section with glass windows, and a stone brick platform base. The building features a symmetrical design with a gable roof and appears to be a defensive or storage structure.
rebuild_hints: Start with a 10×6 stone brick platform base, approximately 2 blocks high
Build wooden plank walls on top of the stone foundation, approximately 3 blocks tall
Install 3-4 glass windows per long side, evenly spaced
Add wooden fence posts at corners for structural definition
Construct a gable roof using dark wood planks, peaked at center
Ensure bilateral symmetry along the length axis
The roof appears to have multiple layers creating a stepped gable effect
uncertainties: Precise number of roof layers and their exact configuration
Whether the structure has multiple interior floors or is single-story
Exact window frame material (appears to be stone brick but could be other variants)
Specific wood type (oak, spruce, dark oak) cannot be definitively determined from color alone
